title: eriope obovata var. obovata
intro: Eriope obovata var. obovata, also known as a shrub or dwarf shrub, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oil content, which includes compounds such as borneol, camphor, and linalool. The health benefits of Eriope obovata var. obovata include its use in treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made in the form of teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
